era: 1989-1994. Grunge. E=7 -- raw power, female-fronted, heavy guitar. Seattle. C/Z to A&M.

theory_nodes.concept: Female-fronted grunge at E=7: Carrie Akre's vocal range brings emotional register variety that the canonical male grunge tradition does not always reach. Equal intensity, different approach.
C/Z to A&M trajectory: Seattle independent to major label. Post-Nirvana signing window. Commercial timing problem: major deal as grunge market plateaus 1993-1994.
Three consecutive SPS E=9 (302-304): Cougar, Gray Wolf, Grizzly Bear. Unprecedented in SPS engine. Ecological ceiling held for three degrees. Closes at 304.

cross_references.relationship: E=5 to E=7. Soul post-grunge to raw grunge. Four-degree arc closes with escalation.
Arc opening at E=6. Four-degree arc 301-304 complete.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=9. URSIDAE AT MAXIMUM. Full roar plus ground percussion. Third consecutive E=9. E=7 + E=9 = E=16.
